segments.text: SALLY: Good morning. Thanks for coming in to see us here at the agency, Joe.
segments.translation: 萨利：早上好。乔，十分感谢你来公司见我。

segments.text: I'm one of the agency representatives, and my name's Sally Baker.
segments.translation: 我是机构的代表之一，我叫萨利·贝克。

segments.text: JOE: Hi Sally. I think we spoke on the phone, didn't we?
segments.translation: 乔：你好，萨利。我想我们之前通过电话，对吗？

segments.text: SALLY: That's right, we did.
segments.translation: 萨利：没错。

segments.text: So thank you for sending in your CV.
segments.translation: 感谢你发来你的简历。

segments.text: We've had quite a careful look at it and I think we have two jobs that might be suitable for you.
segments.translation: 我们已经认真地看过了。我觉得目前可能有两份适合你的工作。

segments.text: JOE: OK.
segments.translation: 乔：好的。

segments.text: SALLY: The first one is in a company based in North London.
segments.translation: 萨利。第一份来自伦敦北部的一家公司。

segments.text: They're looking for an administrative assistant.
segments.translation: 招聘的是行政助理。

segments.text: JOE: OK. What sort of company is it?
segments.translation: 乔：好的。经营什么的公司？

segments.text: SALLY: They're called Home Solutions and they design and make furniture.
segments.translation: 萨利：是一家设计制作家具的公司，叫做家装解决者。

segments.text: JOE: Oh, I don't know much about that, but it sounds interesting.
segments.translation: 乔：是吗？我对它并不了解，但听起来不错。

segments.text: SALLY: Yes, well as I said, they want someone in their office, and looking at your past experience it does look as if you fit quite a few of the requirements.
segments.translation: 萨利：是的，正如我刚才说到的，他们想要招聘一些办公室员工。你之前的经验看起来确实挺符合他们的要求的。

segments.text: So on your CV it appears you've done some data entry?
segments.translation: 从简历上看，你之前做过数据录入工作，是吗？

segments.text: JOE: Yes.
segments.translation: 乔：是的。

segments.text: SALLY: So that's one skill they want.
segments.translation: 萨利：这也正是他们希望员工掌握的技巧。

segments.text: Then they expect the person they appoint to attend meetings and take notes there …
segments.translation: 另外，他们希望他们招聘的员工能够出席会议并做好会议笔记。

segments.text: JOE: OK. I've done that before, yes.
segments.translation: 乔：好的。我之前也做过这些。

segments.text: SALLY: And you'd need to be able to cope with general admin.
segments.translation: 萨利：而且你要能适应总务部的工作。

segments.text: JOE: Filing, and keeping records and so on? That should be OK.
segments.translation: 乔：归档，然后做记录这些？应该没问题。

segments.text: And in my last job I also had to manage the diary.
segments.translation: 上一份工作还需要我整理工作日志。

segments.text: SALLY: Excellent. That's something they want here too.
segments.translation: 萨利：太好了。这也是他们要求的工作技能。

segments.text: I'd suggest you add it to your CV - I don't think you mentioned that, did you?
segments.translation: 我建议你把这些经验加到你的简历中，我记得你之前好像没提到，是吗？

segments.text: JOE: No.
segments.translation: 乔：没有。

segments.text: SALLY: So as far as the requirements go, they want good computer skills, of course, and they particularly mention spreadsheets.
segments.translation: 萨利：说到要求，熟练的电脑技能当然也是必须的。他们还特别提到了电子制表软件。

segments.text: JOE: That should be fine.
segments.translation: 乔：这些应该也没问题。

segments.text: SALLY: And interpersonal skills - which would be something they'd check with your references.
segments.translation: 萨利：还要有人际交往能力，他们可能会在你的推荐信中确认这个。

segments.text: JOE: I think that should be OK, yes.
segments.translation: 乔：我觉得没问题。

segments.text: SALLY: Then they mention that they want someone who is careful and takes care with details - just looking at your CV, I'd say you're probably alright there.
segments.translation: 萨利：还有他们提到了希望应聘者细心认真，注意细节。看你的简历，我觉得你可能也很符合。

segments.text: JOE: I think so, yes. Do they want any special experience?
segments.translation: 乔：我觉得也是。需要特别的工作经验吗？

segments.text: SALLY: I think they wanted some experience of teleconferencing.
segments.translation: 萨利：我觉得他们希望应聘者有过电话会议工作的经验。

segments.text: JOE: I've got three years' experience of that.
segments.translation: 乔：我之前有过三年的经验。

segments.text: SALLY: Let's see, yes, good.
segments.translation: 萨利：我看看，哦，是的。

segments.text: In fact they're only asking for at least one year, so that's great.
segments.translation: 事实上，他们要求的是至少有一年的工作经验，太棒了。

segments.text: So is that something that might interest you?
segments.translation: 所以这份工作你感兴趣吗？

segments.text: JOE: It is, yes. The only thing is, you said they were in North London so it would be quite a long commute for me.
segments.translation: 乔：是的。唯一的就是你刚才提到他们是在伦敦北部，所以对我来说通勤时间会很长。

segments.text: SALLY: OK.
segments.translation: 萨利：理解了。

segments.text: SALLY: So the second position might suit you better as far as the location goes; that's for a warehouse assistant and that's in South London.
segments.translation: 萨利：要是说地点的话，第二份工作也许更适合你。伦敦南部的一家公司在招聘仓库助理。

segments.text: JOE: Yes, that would be a lot closer.
segments.translation: 乔：这样距离就近多了。

segments.text: SALLY: And you've worked in a warehouse before, haven't you?
segments.translation: 萨利：你之前在仓库工作过，对吗？

segments.text: JOE: Yes.
segments.translation: 乔：是的。

segments.text: SALLY: So as far as the responsibilities for this position go, they want someone who can manage the stock, obviously, and also deliveries.
segments.translation: 萨利：说到这份工作的职责，很明显，他们希望应聘者能够管理库存和交货。

segments.text: JOE: That should be OK.
segments.translation: 乔：这应该没问题。

segments.text: You've got to keep track of stuff, but I've always been quite good with numbers.
segments.translation: 这份工作需要员工记录数字，而我对数字一向很在行。

segments.text: SALLY: Good. That's their first requirement.
segments.translation: 萨利：太好了。这是第一个要求。

segments.text: And they want someone who's computer literate, which we know you are.
segments.translation: 他们还希望应聘者精通电脑，我知道这对你来说也没有问题。

segments.text: JOE: Sure.
segments.translation: 乔：确实。

segments.text: SALLY: Then they mention organisational skills.
segments.translation: 萨利：然后他们还说到了组织技能。

segments.text: They want someone who's well organised.
segments.translation: 他们希望应聘者做事情要有条理。

segments.text: JOE: Yes, I think I am.
segments.translation: 乔：好的，我觉得我还行。

segments.text: SALLY: And tidy?
segments.translation: 萨利：还要利落。

segments.text: JOE: Yes, they go together really, don't they?
segments.translation: 乔：是的，这两者是一致的，对不对？

segments.text: SALLY: Sure. Then the usual stuff; they want someone who can communicate well both orally and in writing.
segments.translation: 萨利：确实。剩下的就是平常的要求了。他们希望应聘者有良好的口头和书面表达能力。

segments.text: JOE: OK. And for the last warehouse job I had, one of the things I enjoyed most was being part of a team.
segments.translation: 乔：知道了。我之前在仓库工作的时候，最享受的一件事儿就是成为团队的一员。

segments.text: I found that was really essential for the job.
segments.translation: 我发现这对做好工作是十分重要的。

segments.text: SALLY: Excellent. Yes, they do mention that they want someone who's used to that, yes.
segments.translation: 萨利：你说得太对了。是的，他们确实提到了希望应聘者能够习惯团队合作。

segments.text: Now when you were working in a warehouse last time, what sorts of items were you dealing with?
segments.translation: 好了。你上次在仓库工作是什么时候？你主要处理什么物品？

segments.text: JOE: It was mostly bathroom and kitchen equipment, sinks and stoves and fridges.
segments.translation: 乔：主要是浴室和厨房设备，水槽、炉灶和冰箱。

segments.text: SALLY: So you're OK moving heavy things?
segments.translation: 萨利：你能够搬重物吗？

segments.text: JOE: Sure. I'm quite strong, and I've had the training.
segments.translation: 乔：当然。我身体很强壮，我之前接受过培训。

segments.text: SALLY: Good. Now as far as experience goes, they mention they want someone with a licence, and that you have experience of driving in London - so you can cope with the traffic and so on.
segments.translation: 萨利：好的。说到经验，招聘单位希望应聘者有驾照，还要有在伦敦驾驶的经验。这样你可以应付交通情况等等。

segments.text: JOE: Yes, no problem.
segments.translation: 乔：好的，没问题。

segments.text: SALLY: And you've got experience of warehouse work … and the final thing they mention is customer service.
segments.translation: 萨利：你有过在仓库工作的经验……最后一项就是客户服务。

segments.text: I think looking at your CV you're OK there.
segments.translation: 我记得从你的简历上看你这方面还不错，

segments.text: JOE: Right. So what about pay?
segments.translation: 乔：是的。薪酬怎么样呢？

segments.text: Can you tell me a bit more about that, please …
segments.translation: 麻烦你告诉我一些关于报酬的信息……
